title: Data Migration Temp Staff
description:
Duties & Responsibilities:

  • Generate the migration scripts (e.g. VBA and Python) required for all batches
  • Ensure rollback scripts are included for all batches in every Work Order
  • Responsible to validate the script for all batches in every Work Order prior implementation
  • To perform preliminary automated sorting and generate system-assisted grouping outputs.
  • Conduct comprehensive manual validation to ensure accuracy of all preliminary outputs.
  • Ensure end-to-end alignment of service types
  • Process and organize all the local port (LP), number port (NP), and partial LP related data sets
  • Conduct thorough validation to confirm the accuracy, consistency and correctness of all LP data sets
  • Rectify data discrepancies (“dirty data”) through systematic correction, clarification or escalation to Customer’s team
  • Perform weekly data validation exercise prior to batch finalization to ensure datasets remain up-to-date and migration ready
  • Conduct regular check of MSAN IP reachability to ensure network readiness for migration
  • Document all reachability tests and highlight any in-accessible nodes for rectification

Pre-migration activities

Perform pre-migration checks and testing to ensure service readiness, including:

  • Test matrix execution;
  • Inbound/outbound call scenarios;
  • Confirmation that subscriber data is fully synchronized prior migration;
  • Identification and rectification of anomalies that may impact the migration process

During-migration activities

Carry out migration activities in accordance with the approved cutover schedule, including:

  • Execution of approved migration scripts for provisioning, rollback;
  • Real-time monitoring of migration status and KPIs;
  • Immediate troubleshooting and escalation of any errors, mismatches, or failed migration entries;
  • Coordination with Customer and Huawei teams to validate progress and address exceptions;
  • Documentation of all actions performed during the migration window

Post-migration activities

  • Perform post-migration call testing;
  • Validate that subscribers services are fully restored and operating as expected;
  • Conduct post-migration monitoring to detect abnormalities or service degradation;
  • Rectify all post-cutover issues prior to work order (WO) closure; and
  • Submit complete migration evidence, logs and reports for Customer verification and audit.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Engineering, Telecommunications, or related disciplines.
  • Relevant professional certifications in data management, scripting, or telecommunications systems will be an advantage.

Technical Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 2–5 years of hands-on experience in data migration, system cutover, or production implementation environments.
  • Proven experience in developing and executing migration scripts using VBA, Python, or similar scripting languages.
  • Strong understanding of data validation, reconciliation, and rollback procedures in large-scale migrations.
  • Experience handling large and complex datasets, including data cleansing and rectification of “dirty data”.
  • Familiarity with telecommunications systems and workflows, including:Local Port (LP), Number Portability (NP), and partial LP processesMSAN systems and IP reachability testing
  • Experience performing pre-migration, during-migration, and post-migration activities, including call testing and service validation.
  • Ability to execute and interpret test matrices, inbound/outbound call scenarios, and KPI monitoring during cutover.
  • Comfortable working with production systems and managing high-risk migration windows.


All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits.

Kindly email your resume in a detailed Word format to carlo@peopleprofilers.com

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified


People Profilers Pte Ltd

20 Cecil Street, #08-09 PLUS Building Singapore 049705

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
